name: Thrown
entries: If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw the weapon to make a ranged attack, and if the weapon is a Melee weapon, you use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you would use for a melee attack with the weapon. For example, if you throw a {@item Handaxe|XPHB}, you use your Strength, but if you throw a {@item Dagger|XPHB}, you can use your Strength or Dexterity since the Dagger has the {@itemProperty F|XPHB|Finesse} property.
